mod.sbuild.name: SBuild
command.sbuild.error.player_only: This command can only be used by a player.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.empty_query: Ask a short question, for example: 'how to load a schematic?' or 'what should I do next?'.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.status.no_schema: No schematic loaded yet. Storage points: %s.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.load_howto: Use /sbuild schematic list, then /sbuild schematic load <name>.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.next_step.no_sch: First load a schematic: /sbuild schematic list -> /sbuild schematic load <name>.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.next_step.no_sto: Schematic is loaded. Next step: register chests with /sbuild chest set <name>, then run /sbuild materials report.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.next_step.ready: Next step: run /sbuild materials report, then /sbuild planner preview for block order.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.storage.none: No storage points yet. Look at a chest and run /sbuild chest set <name>.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.storage.with_cou: Registered storage points: %s. Use /sbuild chest list to inspect them.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.materials.ready: Use /sbuild materials report to see required, built, remaining, and available materials.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.materials.no_sch: Load a schematic first, then run /sbuild materials report.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.planner.ready: Run /sbuild planner preview to see the first placement tasks.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.planner.no_schem: Planner needs a loaded schematic. Use /sbuild schematic load <name> first.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.help: I can help with schematic loading, status, storage, materials, planner, and next steps.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.unknown.loaded: I didn't fully match that request. Current state: schematic loaded, storage points=%s. Try: 'next step', 'materials', or 'planner'.
command.sbuild.ai.reply.unknown.no_schem: I didn't fully match that request. Current state: no loaded schematic, storage points=%s. Try: 'how to load schematic' or 'next step'.
